positive: Minimalist abstract celestial map design, featuring interconnected glowing nebula patterns and constellation lines drawn in bright sapphire blue and gold foil texture. The central subject is a stylized, geometric grouping of celestial bodies, rendered with clean, crisp lines against a deep midnight indigo background. Use a blend of modern Art Deco symmetry and cosmic wonder, ensuring the elements are highly scalable and visible on fabric. High contrast, luminous glow effect, negative space emphasized. Flat vector illustration style with metallic sheen.
